statics.description: Spells your opponents cast that target CARDNAME cost {1} less to cast.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME dies, return it to the battlefield transformed under your control attached to target opponent.

statics.description: Spells you cast that target enchanted player cost {1} less to cast.

triggers.description: At the beginning of enchanted player's upkeep, that player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
